title: TAKE ROOTS PARENTING CONNECTIONS - 211info
text: DOUGLAS EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT TAKE ROOTS PARENTING CONNECTIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offering parent resources and support for education and family engagement activities. 1409 NE Diamond Lake Boulevard Suite 110 Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (541) 957-4819 ..12.. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 957-4819 Julie Hurley [email protected] Main phone (541) 670-6123 Klamath County Coordinator Laura Barajas [email protected] Main phone (541) 219-6100 Lake County Coordinator Bailey Guido [email protected] Alternate (541) 957-4814 Sarah Wheelock [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Douglas, Klamath, and Lake Counties Services: Community Calendars * Parenting Issues Parenting Materials Parenting Skills Classes Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EDUCATION SERVICES EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - SOUTH-CENTRAL EARLY LEARNING HUB EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - HOME SCHOOLING EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - SPECIAL EDUCATION PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - PRESCHOOL PROMISE PUBLIC SAFETY - CARE CONNECTIONS AND EDUCATION REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - EARLY INTERVENTION AND EARLY CHILDHOOD SPECIAL EDUCATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
